top_signals.title: Australia’s crypto travel rule is coming into effect: Here’s what's changing
top_signals.summary: From July, crypto exchanges operating in Australia will prompt for additional information on all outgoing and incoming transfers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Eldorado-Vantage Merger Signals Continued Offshore Drilling Consolidation
top_signals.summary: On 29 May 2026, Vantage Drilling International and Eldorado Drilling signed a merger agreement under which Eldorado will acquire Vantage, making it a wholly owned subsidiary. As part of the transaction, Vantage shareholders will receive $19 per share in cash…
